title: Hap Tim luxury 4 Person Picnic Backpack Picnic Rucksack Bag Hamper with Insulated Cooler Compartment includes Tableware & Fleece Blanket(EU3065)
features: STYLISH & HANDSFREE - Looks fashional and reliably holds all your essential items for an outdoor picnic party - all while freeing up both of your hands and more comfortable than regular picnic basket.

HIGH QUALITY & DURABLE - Made of high quality Nylon garment fabric with PU back coating(stronger and much better than polyester,high strength, high wear resistance,good resistance to deformation,comfortable,anti-water material),non-fraying stitching, and strong zippers means you’ll have a bag that lasts for years.

PREMIUM PICNIC SUPPLIES - Cutlery set includes 4×(stainless steel knives, forks, spoons, dinner plates, cotton napkins, wine glasses ) & 1×cheesetter knife & 1×bottle opener & 2×Salt/pepper shakers & 1×plastic chopping board, + Water resistant fleece blanket,size 45x53 inch

OVERSIZED STORAGE COMPARTMENT + SIDE BOTTLE/WINE COOLER - Food storage compartment is 20% bigger than competitors with premium insulation lining for foods to stay warm or cooler longer,A detachable big side zipper closure insulated bottle/wine cooler to carry a large bottle of wine/water securely.
GUARANTEE DETAILS - Satisfaction Guaranteed, 50 days free exchange and returns plus 185 days warranty.
description: Product Description Hap Tim picnic backpack creat a comfortable lifestyle for relaxing and fun! This all-in-1 catering for 4 Backpack keep food and drinks fresh and organized and provides plenty of excuses to pack a picnic. Spending a wonderful day with your family or friends in the park, forest, beach or wild. Hap Tim picnic set can just make your exquisite outdoor picnic trip enjoyable and unforgettable. Pack your movable feast of home made products, from beer and bread to cheese and chocolate and head outside! With its stylish design and soft padded straps the Picnic Backpack makes it easy for you to carry everything you need for a perfect picnic day! Superior Quality The picnic baskets backpack features a detachable bottle holder which will hold a bottle of wine and keep it cool at the same time. The blanket holder will securely holds a brown fleece tartan pattern blanket with waterproof PEVA backing to ensure you enjoy the most of your picnic even if the grass is slightly wet - size: 45" x 53". The backpack is ideal for storing your picnic foods such as fruit, sandwiches, cold meats and cheeses. Made from PEVA and a polyester lining the cooler compartment will keep your food fresh and cool whilst zipped up securely. Picnic Dining Set Inside the backpack you’ll find everything you need for the perfect picnic for four: 4 x stainless steel knives 4 x stainless steel forks 4 x stainless steel spoon 4 x dinner plates 4 x wine glasses 4 x cotton napkins 2 x salt and pepper shakers 1x cheese knife a plastic chopping board Extra Large Insulated Food Compartment Hap Tim Picnic Backpack Set for 4 will help you stay engaged with your family and friends.Taking your Picnic Backpack to regular picnics and creating a family ritual where you can introduce your young ones to sports, games, and nature, which encourages adults to take part in physical activities as well. Pour the wine into the durable non-shatter wine glasses and celebrate life! Your Family Bonding Picnic Set Your Picnic Backpack comes with complete tableware set for 4 and a detachable insulated cooler for your wine bottle. Pour for 4 in the elegant glasses, spread the butter with the stainless steel knife, taste the cheese on the artisan bamboo chopping board and enjoy the feast on the soft waterproof fleece tartan blanket! Be Proud to Present for Any Occasion! Present Hap Tim Picnic Backpack to your loved ones on Mother's Day, Father's Day, Thanksgiving, Birthday and also great gift idea for wedding and housewarming. This is a practical gift that can be used anywhere and any time! The elegant design and superior quality offers confidence when presenting to friends and loved ones. Prior Choice for Picnic In the leisure time, you can bring your family or friends, carry a picnic bag to experience the real "natural" restaurant, breathe this fresh air, enjoying delicious food and wine, talking about this pleasant topic, playing your favorite little game, following the warm sunshine and the cool breeze, and forgetting the troubles that happened this week!
